case_title: BAY CREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL ASSOCIATION VS LINDSTROM, ERIK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINDSTROM, ERIK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,908.38 FILED BY BAY CREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT LINDSTROM, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
